text:
On Wed, Oct 16, 2013 at 11:26 AM, Rusmir Dusko <nemysis@freebsd.org> wrote:
> - Update to 0.58
> - Add master sites
> - Change dependency for devel/llvm
> - Change gnomehack to pathfix
> - Remove USE_PURE=yes and bsd.pure.mk
> - Change DOCS and EXAMPLES, add DOCS, ETC and EXAMPLES Options
> - Support STAGEDIR and add OPTIONS_SUB
> - Change WWW

LGTM, if the trend is to drop .mk files.
